finding_cards.finding: Trump-Xi summit Day 2 closed without new Iran breakthroughs announced. Trump framing shifted from summit-Day-1 Iran focus ('That's a big statement' on Xi's no-military-equipment pledge) to trade/energy deal framing ('fantastic trade deals'; China buying US oil). No new Iran-specific joint communique content beyond Day 1. No Netanyahu-Trump contact documented for May 14-15 period. Day 1 Iran communique content held through summit close: Hormuz 'must remain open'; Iran 'can never have a nuclear weapon'; Xi no military equipment pledge sustained. The 48-hour window test (does Trump hold deal-leaning absent Netanyahu rebroadcast) is ongoing — Day 1 of the window has passed without documented Netanyahu contact and without Trump reversal. Post-summit Trump focus was trade/energy, suggesting deal-leaning posture cooling toward business framing rather than nuclear-deal urgency.

Three Republicans voted yes: Murkowski, Collins, and Rand Paul. Day 77 SITREP listed 'Murkowski, Collins, Paul' — Rand Paul's inclusion is confirmed, making him the 3rd Republican defector (not previously named in Day 77 SITREP count of 3 GOP yes). All four Day 76 'in-play' senators (Tillis, Hawley, Young, Curtis) voted no. No 8th vote scheduled. Day 60 WPA deadline passed May 1 without judicial challenge. 'Hostilities terminated' precedent accumulating.

finding_cards.finding: DAY 77 PROBE-12' MISFIRE CONFIRMED. WebFetch of fm.gov.om/en/24744/ confirms: page dated May 21, 2025; announces 5th round for Rome May 23, 2025 — definitively the 2025 pre-war round. WebFetch of Oman FM homepage (fm.gov.om/en/) confirms: most recent news items are May 14-15 2026 (Yemen prisoner release; Oman-Canada bilateral; Oman FM phone call with Portugal) — NO announcement of a 2026 post-war Iran-US round. Oman FM has made no 2026 announcement of a new round of talks. The Day 77 PROBE-12' 'fired H provisional' was a misattribution — the Oman FM source cited was the 2025 pre-war Rome round reindexed. Meta-Negotiation Regression is NOT interrupted. There is no scheduled 5th (post-war) round as of Day 78. The 11-day focal-point structure (summit → Rome May 23 → Hajj May 25) loses its middle element; operative focal-point structure is summit (May 14-15) + Hajj (~May 25) only.

Fork D' indefinite deferral is now the operative default trajectory absent a new Oman FM announcement of a post-war round. This is the cycle's most significant framework finding.

sources: Synthetic composite from PROBE-2, PROBE-6, PROBE-7, PROBE-9, PROBE-10, PROBE-12', PROBE-13 Day 78 outputs
finding_cards.finding: No single first-mover threshold definitively breached Day 78. Race condition tightening across three axes simultaneously. Iranian coalition rupture (BS-1b): 10th gap cycle; no rupture signal. Trump A1 binding (BS-5/BS-14): 48h window Day 1 passed without reversal and without Netanyahu contact — deal-leaning holding but cooling to trade framing. Israeli operational graduation (BS-3/BS-14): operational readying from Day 77 unchanged; Knesset dissolution advancing; no strike order. WPR-as-forcing-function (BS-5): 7th vote failed; 8th vote unscheduled; Fetterman mechanism operative. Strangulation transmission (BS-1b/BS-7): Brent softened to $105; no Kharg saturation; export stall continuing. MATERIAL DOWNGRADE: Rome May 23 scheduling unconfirmed (PROBE-12' partial L); focal-point structure may be summit + Hajj only, not summit + Rome + Hajj. If Rome is not a 2026 event, the 11-day window's middle focal point is absent.

calibration_check.assessment: Central thesis holding. Day 78's material finding is a framework correction, not a thesis break: the Day 77 Rome scheduling was a misattribution; Meta-Negotiation Regression is not interrupted. The architecture has reproduced a different output than Day 77 modeled — the convergence window is summit + Hajj only (not three focal points), and Fork D' is the operative default absent new round scheduling. The constraint architecture continues to bind: US-Iran convergence requires Vahidi ratification (opposed), Trump deal-direction held past 48h (Day 1 holding without Netanyahu contact), and Israeli pre-emption window open (operational readying ongoing; Knesset dissolution advancing).
